personality_one_liner: A vibrant, touchable, and fast deal-finding experience that feels like a game, grounded by deep ink typography and punchy coral accents.

spacing.rule: Generous touch targets. Use md/lg padding inside cards to make them feel chunky and touchable. Never cramp price text.

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: The main entry point to instantly search for a product or browse curated deals.

states.loading: Bouncing brand icon in the center of the screen.
states.error: Playful oops illustration with a Coral retry button.

screens.layout: Large playful search bar with pill radius. Horizontal scrolling chip row for categories (using brandTertiary). 'Trending Deals' section with horizontal scrolling cards (width: screenWidth minus 2*lg padding). Each card has a large thumbnail, and an oversized price badge.

screens.name: Search Results
screens.purpose: Show exact and similar product matches quickly.

states.loading: Skeleton rows mimicking the product cards.
states.empty: Playful 3D empty box illustration with text 'No products found'.

screens.layout: Vertical list of chunky cards. Each card has a left-aligned product thumbnail, right-aligned details: Product name (Fredoka), lowest price (BrandPrimary), and store count badge. Use 'Best Match' pill on the top result.

screens.name: Product Detail
screens.purpose: The core comparison experience showing product info and ranked stores.

states.loading: Skeleton image hero and store rows.

screens.layout: Top hero image with glassmorphism top header overlay. Large Product Name and 'Lowest Price' highlighted. Vertical list for Stores, sorted lowest to highest. The lowest store has a 'Best Deal' badge and a Mint/Coral border. Savings shown in Mint (success). Sticky 'Buy Now' button at the bottom using safe-area.

screens.name: Categories Browse
screens.layout: 2-column flexWrap grid. Each category tile uses surfaceSecondary, lg padding, large 32pt Phosphor icon inside a brandTertiary circle, and bold text centered.

screens.name: Watchlist
screens.purpose: Local saved deals tracking price drops.

states.empty: Illustration of a playful character or empty box with text 'Your watchlist is empty'.

screens.layout: List of saved product cards, similar to Search Results but with a prominent 'Price Dropped' indicator (in Mint) if applicable.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Tactile / Playful aesthetic (Personality 4). Use thick, chunky components with 'lg' to 'pill' radii. The app should feel approachable, fun, and highly touchable.

NO BLUE, INDIGO, OR PURPLE ALLOWED. Use Coral (#FF5A5F) for primary actions, Mint (#06D6A0) for success/savings, and Mustard (#FFD166) for warnings/highlights. The base typography is a deep ink (#1A1B20) on a warm off-white (#FDFBF7) background.
Typography: Use 'Fredoka' for all headings and big price numbers to give a bouncy feel. Use 'Nunito' for body text. All font weights cap at 500.

On the Product Detail screen, list the stores in a vertical list, sorted by lowest price. Highlight the #1 lowest price store card with a 'borderStrong' in Mint or Coral, and an absolute positioned 'Best Deal' badge intersecting the top edge of the card.
Implement a sticky 'Buy Now' CTA wrapped in a Glassmorphism container at the bottom of the Product Detail screen.
Use Phosphor filled icons (24pt) for tab bars and standard list actions.
Always apply a top-to-bottom linear gradient scrim when placing text on top of images (e.g., hero cards).
Empty states should utilize the 'empty_box' image along with playful Fredoka typography to keep the user engaged even when there's no data.
